name: mongo
description: Node.js application using MongoDB for user management with authentication. to learn how to create a RESTful API with Express and MongoDB, implement user authentication with bcrypt, and manage environment variables with dotenv. also includes CORS support for cross-origin requests. and nodemon for development. plus, it uses commonjs module system. also, it has a simple user model with username and password fields. then, it has basic routes for user registration and login.
author: Saurabh Sir
